skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge for 8 time(s). Affects all allies.
skill1.note: SR = 1 hit/pull so hitCount 8 = 8 full-charge attacks. Faithful.

skill1.kitLine: Max HP ▲ 5% of the skill user's Max HP without restoring HP, lasts for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Time-averaged (5% × ~45% uptime ≈ 2.3 ⚑). 'Without restoring HP' qualifier is inert (no HP pool/healing modeled); documented in unmodeled. Grant itself is modeled but offensively INERT per 2026-07-17 correction (casterMaxHpPct does not feed ally ATK conversion).
Exact value. Fires every 8 full-charge attacks to all allies.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when assigned to the back row in battle. Affects self and 2 allies on both sides.
skill2.note: Back-row condition assumed (sim scope: fixed slot). 'Self and 2 allies on both sides' = selfAndAdjacent(2) which in a 5-slot squad = whole team. Positional targeting confirmed by run-E videos.
Exact kit value. Permanent passive (Sword Coin is the initial/default coin state). This is Rouge's primary offensive contribution per the 2026-07-17 correction.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge for 30 time(s). Affects self and 2 allies on both sides when in Sword Coin status. Shield Coin: Damage Taken ▼15.2% continuously.
skill2.note: Defensive (Damage Taken reduction); boss deals no damage in v1 sim. Correctly skipped.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill for 5 time(s). Affects all allies when in Shield Coin status. Double Sword Coin: Max HP ▲ 15.08% of the skill user's Max HP continuously.
skill2.where: skill2[1] casterMaxHpPct 7.5 (time-averaged: 15.08 × ~50% uptime) + burst[2] casterMaxHpPct 8.7 (15.08 × ~58% uptime, selfAndAdjacent)
skill2.note: Coin progression (Sword→Shield@30FC→DoubleSword@5bursts) not tracked as engine state; absorbed into ⚑ timeline averages (documented in unmodeled.skill2[1]). The 15.08% appears in BOTH skill2[1] and burst[2] — a known double-count flagged in ks-extract F1/F2, but rendered INERT by the 2026-07-17 correction (casterMaxHpPct ally grants do not feed ATK conversion).

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. ATK ▲ 15.07% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
burst.note: Exact kit value, correct duration. This is the primary offensive burst buff.

burst.kitLine: Activates when in Sword Coin status. Affects all allies. Max HP ▲ 10.15% of the skill user's Max HP without restoring HP, lasts for 10 sec.
burst.note: The 10.15/20.1/30.02 coin-tier ladder is time-averaged into 22 + 22.5 = 44.5% per cast (exceeds kit max 30.02% — double-count per ks-extract F1/F2). All casterMaxHpPct grants are offensively INERT per 2026-07-17 correction. 'Without restoring HP' qualifier inert (no HP pool).

burst.kitLine: Activates when in Shield Coin status. Affects all allies. Max HP ▲ 20.1% of the skill user's Max HP for 10 sec.
burst.note: Same as above — coin-tier ladder averaged. Inert per correction.

burst.kitLine: Activates when in Double Sword Coin status. Affects all allies. Max HP ▲ 30.02% of the skill user's Max HP without restoring HP, lasts for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0]+burst[1] (part of the 22+22.5 time-averaged ladder) + burst[2] casterMaxHpPct 8.7 (selfAndAdjacent, permanent)
burst.note: Same ladder. Additionally burst[2] models the Double Sword Coin permanent portion separately (8.7 = 15.08 × 58% uptime). Inert per correction.

documentedConfounds.text: 2026-07-17 CORRECTION: ally-granted Max HP does NOT feed a consumer's ATK=%-of-Max-HP conversion — counts OWN Max HP only (cindy e3 video-verified). All casterMaxHpPct ally grants are offensively INERT.
documentedConfounds.why: This correction neutralizes the double-count and all Max-HP grants. They are kept for kit-completeness but contribute zero damage. The HOT gap is NOT caused by these.

documentedConfounds.text: Rouge's ~1.05 board-HOT is a SEPARATE unresolved issue (her offensive buffs / possible F1-F2 burst-Max-HP double-count, now moot for damage since the grants are inert), NOT the Max-HP feed.
documentedConfounds.why: The author explicitly flags the HOT as unresolved. With casterMaxHpPct inert, the only offensive outputs are Sword Coin attackDamagePct 6.65% and burst casterAtkPct 15.07%. The HOT source is unidentified.

documentedConfounds.text: Shield Coin: Damage Taken ▼15.2% continuously (defensive; boss deals no damage in v1).
documentedConfounds.why: Defensive stat; boss deals no damage in the sim. Correctly inert.

documentedConfounds.text: Coin state progression (Sword→Shield@30FC→DoubleSword@5bursts) not tracked as engine state; absorbed into ⚑ timeline-averaged values.
documentedConfounds.why: Timeline averaging could under/over-estimate depending on actual fight timing, but since all affected grants (casterMaxHpPct) are now inert, this confound is moot for damage.

documentedConfounds.text: Skill1 Max HP grant 'without restoring HP' qualifier is inert (no HP pool/healing modeled).
documentedConfounds.why: No HP pool in sim; the qualifier has no mechanical effect. The grant itself is modeled but inert per correction.

documentedConfounds.text: All ⚑ values (2.3, 7.5, 22, 22.5, 8.7) are timeline averages of exact kit numbers, not fits to board data.
documentedConfounds.why: Methodology note. Since all ⚑ casterMaxHpPct values are now inert, their precision is irrelevant to damage output.

documentedConfounds.text: ks-extract F1/F2 (P1): burst Max-HP grants DOUBLE-COUNTED (casterMaxHpPct 22 + 22.5 = 44.5% vs kit max 30.02; Double Sword Coin in both skill2+burst).
documentedConfounds.why: Real structural issue in the override, but rendered damage-irrelevant by the 2026-07-17 correction (casterMaxHpPct ally grants are inert). Would matter if the engine ever re-enables Max-HP→ATK feeding.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Rouge as a positional Supporter whose only damage-relevant outputs are Sword Coin Attack Damage ▲6.65% (selfAndAdjacent, permanent) and burst casterAtkPct 15.07% (all allies, 10s). All Max-HP grants (skill1 5%, skill2 Double Sword 15.08%, burst coin-tier ladder 10.15/20.1/30.02) are present as casterMaxHpPct blocks for kit-completeness but were declared offensively INERT by a 2026-07-17 correction (ally Max-HP grants do not feed ATK=%-of-Max-HP conversions). The burst blocks contain a known double-count (22+22.5=44.5% vs kit max 30.02%) that is now moot. Shield Coin (Damage Taken ▼15.2%) and coin-state progression are deliberately unmodeled (defensive / absorbed into timeline averages). The ~1.05 HOT board reading is explicitly flagged as a separate unresolved issue whose cause is unidentified.
